title: Mission Acceptance Envelopes
description: Schema for missions/<id>/acceptance.yaml. Drives mission self-tests (IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md §19.1).

min_unmodified.description: Lower bound for the score awarded when the user submits the unmodified agent patch.

max_unmodified.description: Upper bound for the score awarded when the user submits the unmodified agent patch. The mission self-test fails outside [min_unmodified, max_unmodified].

min_ideal.description: Lower bound for the ideal-solution score. Typically >= 92.

max_empty.description: Upper bound for an empty-submission score. Typically <= 15.
